en_title: Xbox Boss Asha Sharma Announces 3,200 Layoffs, Including 1,600 Today, With 4 Studios Leaving for New Management — Read the Email to Staff in Full
subtitle: 游戏业务不健康
opus_summary: Microsoft宣布本财年XBOX将裁员3200人，其中1600人会在7月6日当天离职。作为重组的一部分，四家工作室将转由新管理层接手，另有一家工作室正就未来进行协商。

paragraphs.en: Microsoft has announced 3,200 staff are set to lose their jobs at Xbox across the current financial year, with 1,600 of those layoffs happening today, July 6. As part of the restructure, four studios are leaving Xbox to new management, and one is now in consultation over its future.
paragraphs.cn: Microsoft宣布，本财年XBOX将有3200名员工失去工作，其中1600人的裁员会在今天，也就是7月6日发生。作为重组的一部分，四家工作室将离开XBOX并转由新管理层接手，另有一家工作室正就未来进行协商。

paragraphs.en: In an email sent to staff and reviewed by IGN, Xbox boss Asha Sharma called it the most 鈥渟ignificant鈥?restructure in Xbox history, insisting Microsoft鈥檚 gaming business 鈥渋s not healthy.鈥?Overall, Microsoft's gaming business is losing about one-fifth of its staff.
paragraphs.cn: 在一封发给员工、并由IGN查阅的邮件中，XBOX负责人Asha Sharma称这是XBOX史上最「重大」的重组，并坚称Microsoft的游戏业务「并不健康」。总体来看，Microsoft游戏业务将失去约五分之一员工。

paragraphs.en: South of Midnight developer Compulsion Games and Psychonauts developer Double Fine Productions will return to management and transition to independent studios with their IP, catalog, and with 鈥渞unway for their next games,鈥?Sharma said. These games are so far unannounced. In Double Fine's case, it leaves Microsoft with the Psychonauts IP.
paragraphs.cn: Sharma表示，《午夜之南》开发商Compulsion Games和《意航员》开发商Double Fine Productions将回归自主管理，并带着各自IP、作品目录以及「下一款游戏的缓冲空间」转型为独立工作室。这些新游戏目前尚未公布。就Double Fine而言，这意味着Microsoft仍保留《意航员》IP。

paragraphs.en: Meanwhile, Hellblade developer Ninja Theory and State of Decay developer Undead Labs 鈥渉ave entered terms to join new ownership with funding to complete and grow Senua and State of Decay 3.鈥?This suggests both games will release eventually, developed under new ownership. Microsoft did not say who the new owners are.
paragraphs.cn: 与此同时，《地狱之刃》开发商Ninja Theory和《腐烂国度》开发商Undead Labs「已达成条款，将加入新的所有权结构，并获得用于完成和发展《塞娜》与《腐烂国度3》的资金」。这表明两款游戏最终都会发售，并将在新所有者旗下开发。Microsoft没有说明新所有者是谁。

paragraphs.en: Marvel鈥檚 Blade developer Arkane will now see its management enter the required consultation with its Works Council to 鈥渞eview potential strategic options,鈥?per French labor law, with a view to potentially selling or spinning out the studio. There鈥檚 no word on the fate of Marvel鈥檚 Blade specifically.
paragraphs.cn: 漫威《刀锋战士》开发商Arkane的管理层现在将根据法国劳动法，与其劳资委员会展开必要协商，以「评估潜在战略选择」，目标可能是出售或拆分这家工作室。目前尚无关于漫威《刀锋战士》具体命运的消息。

paragraphs.en: Elsewhere, there are layoffs across other parts of Xbox, including Activision, Bethesda/ZeniMax, Blizzard, King, Mojang, and Xbox Game Studios. Microsoft insisted none of its first-party publicly announced games or projects are being cancelled as part of these reductions. That means the likes of Fable, Gears of War: E-Day, Clockwork Revolution, Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4, Minecraft Dungeons 2, and The Elder Scrolls 6 are safe.
paragraphs.cn: 此外，XBOX其他部门也在裁员，包括Activision、Bethesda/ZeniMax、Blizzard、King、Mojang和XBOX Game Studios。Microsoft坚称，这些裁员不会导致其已经公开公布的第一方游戏或项目被取消。这意味着《神鬼寓言》《战争机器：E-Day》《发条革命》《使命召唤：现代战争4》《我的世界：地下城2》和《上古卷轴6》等项目是安全的。

paragraphs.en: Bethesda also owns id Software, which makes Doom and Quake games. MachineGames makes Wolfenstein and, most recently, Indiana Jones. Activision Blizzard makes Call of Duty, World of Warcraft, Diablo, Overwatch, and Candy Crush.
paragraphs.cn: Bethesda还拥有id Software，后者开发《毁灭战士》和《雷神之锤》系列。MachineGames开发《德军总部》，以及最新的《夺宝奇兵》。Activision Blizzard则开发《使命召唤》《魔兽世界》《暗黑破坏神》《守望先锋》和《糖果传奇》。

paragraphs.en: These devastating cuts follow last July's round of layoffs at Microsoft, when 9,000 lost their jobs across the entire business. A number of games were canceled as part of those cuts, including Rare鈥檚 Everwild, and studios shut down, such as Perfect Dark developer The Initiative. Now, just 12 months later, we're here again, although this time Microsoft has managed to find a path forward for affected studios.
paragraphs.cn: 这些沉重裁员发生在Microsoft去年7月一轮裁员之后，当时公司整体有9000人失去工作。那轮裁员中，多款游戏被取消，包括Rare的《Everwild》，也有工作室被关闭，例如《完美黑暗》开发商The Initiative。现在，仅仅12个月后，我们又回到了类似局面，不过这一次Microsoft设法为受影响工作室找到了一条前路。

paragraphs.en: A recent report claimed Sharma wanted to speed up development on new The Elder Scrolls, Fallout, and Halo games as part of the company reset. Details on the potential shakeup came from The Information (via Reuters ), which said that Microsoft hadn't ruled out turning the Xbox brand into a wholly-owned subsidiary. It's said the move could result in Xbox being operated as a joint venture with other partners or even potentially sold.
paragraphs.cn: 最近一篇报道声称，作为公司重置的一部分，Sharma希望加快新《上古卷轴》《辐射》和《光环》游戏的开发。关于潜在震荡的细节来自The Information（路透社转述），该报道称Microsoft并未排除把XBOX品牌变成全资子公司的可能。据称，这一举措可能导致XBOX与其他合作伙伴以合资形式运营，甚至可能被出售。

paragraphs.en: We have much more on this developing story over at our live blog , which we will continue to update as today's news unfolds.
paragraphs.cn: 关于这起仍在发展的事件，我们在实时博客中有更多内容，并会随着今天消息继续展开而持续更新。

paragraphs.en: Here is the email in full as part of this developing story:
paragraphs.cn: 以下是这起发展中事件中员工邮件的全文：
